name: know-act-unity
description: 3 goal-achievement skills grounded in Wang Yangming's philosophy: clarify intent, practice through action, and reflect to calibrate direction
philosophy: 知而不行只是未知——说了但没做，就是还不知道。This plugin closes the gap between knowing and doing, making every step a test of understanding. 澄清→行动→复盘，循环往复，知行并进。
skills_included: clarify-intent: Distills vague goals into one clear, actionable first step (致良知)
act-on-ground: Breaks direction into minimum verifiable actions and executes immediately (事上练)
reflect-anchor: Pauses to confront false assumptions and recalibrate direction (知行复盘)
